test.note: No dedicated test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml; build was used as the available full-suite validator.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define a canonical schema source (db/schema.sql vs src/lib/schema.sql) or require a synchronization workflow when schema fields are changed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix feature added creator_profile.bio to db/schema.sql, but src/lib/schema.sql still omits bio, creating drift risk.

rejectedObservations.observation: fullstack-worker UI verification drift (no agent-browser despite UI changes).
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of prior-round skill guidance recommendation
